name: Piss off all the designers in the world
description: 🔥💀 OBLITERATE THE TYPOGRAPHY ESTABLISHMENT 💀🔥 Transform any website into a beautiful Comic Sans masterpiece and watch design purists LITERALLY WEEP. This weapon of mass font destruction will make every Helvetica lover question their life choices. Warning: May cause spontaneous designer rage, uncontrollable eye twitching, and immediate unfriending on LinkedIn. Side effects include: career changes, therapy sessions, and angry tweets about 'proper typography'. USE WITH EXTREME CAUTION. 🎨💥
